Homebrew Formulae

imagemagick-full

Install command:

Tools and libraries to manipulate images in many formats

https://imagemagick.org/index.php

License: ImageMagick

Development: Pull requests

Formula JSON API: /api/formula/imagemagick-full.json

Formula code: imagemagick-full.rb on GitHub

Bottle (binary package) installation support provided for:

macOS on
Apple Silicon		 tahoe ✅
sequoia ✅
sonoma ✅
macOS on
Intel		 sonoma ✅
Linux ARM64 ✅
x86_64 ✅

Current versions:

stable ✅ 7.1.2-25
head ⚡️ HEAD

Keg-only

Depends on:

cairo 1.18.4 Vector graphics library with cross-device output support
fontconfig 2.18.1 XML-based font configuration API for X Windows
freetype 2.14.3 Software library to render fonts
ghostscript 10.07.1 Interpreter for PostScript and PDF
glib 2.88.1 Core application library for C
jpeg-turbo 3.1.4.1 JPEG image codec that aids compression and decompression
jpeg-xl 0.11.2 New file format for still image compression
libheif 1.23.0 ISO/IEC 23008-12:2017 HEIF file format decoder and encoder
liblqr 0.4.3 C/C++ seam carving library
libpng 1.6.58 Library for manipulating PNG images
libraw 0.22.1 Library for reading RAW files from digital photo cameras
librsvg 2.62.3 Library to render SVG files using Cairo
libtiff 4.7.1 TIFF library and utilities
libtool 2.5.4 Generic library support script
libultrahdr 1.4.0 Reference codec for the Ultra HDR format
libzip 1.11.4 C library for reading, creating, and modifying zip archives
little-cms2 2.19 Color management engine supporting ICC profiles
openexr 3.4.13 High dynamic-range image file format
openjpeg 2.5.4 Library for JPEG-2000 image manipulation
webp 1.6.0 Image format providing lossless and lossy compression for web images
xz 5.8.3 General-purpose data compression with high compression ratio
gdk-pixbuf 2.44.6 Toolkit for image loading and pixel buffer manipulation
gettext 1.0 GNU internationalization (i18n) and localization (l10n) library
imath 3.2.2 Library of 2D and 3D vector, matrix, and math operations
libomp 22.1.8 LLVM's OpenMP runtime library

Depends on when building from source:

pkgconf 2.5.1 Package compiler and linker metadata toolkit
imagemagick-full includes additional tools and libraries that are not included in the regular imagemagick formula.
